# ALiGNWEBS

ALiGNWEBS is a web development agency specialising in custom web application development
and GenAI development for enterprise clients.

## Services

- **Custom Web Application Development**: Mission-critical platforms tailored to complex enterprise workflows, built for thousands of concurrent users with enterprise-grade reliability and security.
- **GenAI Development & LLM Integration**: Embed conversational agents, semantic search, document intelligence, and autonomous workflows directly into enterprise products.
- **High-Scale Cloud Architecture**: Refactor monoliths into scalable microservices and cloud-native architectures designed for millions of requests with single-digit millisecond latency.
- **Design Systems & UI Engineering**: Cohesive design systems and component libraries that accelerate product development while maintaining pixel-perfect quality.
- **API & Platform Engineering**: Robust REST and GraphQL APIs, developer portals, and integration layers that power product ecosystems reliably.

## About

ALiGNWEBS has 10+ years of enterprise software experience, has supported 50+ startups, and maintains a 98% on-time project delivery rate. The agency focuses on full-cycle delivery: discovery, architecture, design, engineering, and launch.
